  • Method Details

    • getTactic

      public ITactic getTactic(String[] inputs, String globalInput)
      Description copied from interface: ITacticApplication
      Returns the tactic to be applied.
      Specified by:
      getTactic in interface ITacticApplication
      Overrides:
      getTactic in class DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
      Parameters:
      inputs - an array of Strings the user can type in for quantified predicates
      globalInput - a String taken from the input area in the Proof Control View
      Returns:
      a tactic to apply

    • getTacticID

      public String getTacticID()
      Description copied from interface: ITacticApplication
      Returns the ID of this tactic.

      Must be the same as the one provided in the 'proofTactics' extension point.

      Specified by:
      getTacticID in interface ITacticApplication
      Overrides:
      getTacticID in class DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
      Returns:
      the ID String of this tactic

    • getHyperlinkBounds

      public org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point getHyperlinkBounds(String parsedString, Predicate parsedPredicate)
      Description copied from interface: IPositionApplication
      Returns the coordinates in the given predicate String where the tactic hyperlink is to be placed.

      Returned point represents a valid range inside the given predicate string.

      Specified by:
      getHyperlinkBounds in interface IPositionApplication
      Overrides:
      getHyperlinkBounds in class DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
      Parameters:
      parsedString - the actual String displayed by the prover ui.
      parsedPredicate - the result of the parsing of the String, source locations are correct but the predicate may not be type-checked
      Returns:
      a Point with x (inclusive) and y (exclusive) as hyperlink bounds

    • getOperatorPosition

      public org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point getOperatorPosition(Predicate predicate, String predStr)
      Description copied from class: DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
      This is the default implementation for finding the source location of position in predicate. Usually, plug-in writers do not need to override this method.
      Overrides:
      getOperatorPosition in class DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
